events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: **fail, high risk**. Non-listed double-tapped breakers violate NEC 408.21/110.3(B) (terminals used only as listed), creating loose-connection and overheating/arc-fault hazards — must be corrected (reterminate with listed twin breakers or a subfeed) and reinspected before the panel is closed out.
